prompt: A fantasy scene illustrating a library where books float in mid-air, their pages projecting holographic stories into a surrounding aurora-like atmosphere.
prompt_refined: Generate a magnificent, fantastical library interior. Numerous ancient books levitate freely throughout the vast, high-ceilinged chamber. From their open, glowing pages, vibrant holographic narratives are projected, blending seamlessly into a luminous, swirling aurora borealis-like atmosphere that engulfs the entire space.
